M1012_INP_PRCDR1_ICD M1012 Inpatient ICD Procedure1 Code This field lists the inpatient ICD and procedure 1 relevant to the plan of care. CHAR 7 x
M1012_INP_PRCDR2_ICD M1012 Inpatient ICD Procedure2 Code This field lists the inpatient ICD and procedure 2 relevant to the plan of care. CHAR 7 x
